sections.title: Everyday Menu
items: Please inform a manager or Chef's Assistant prior to ordering if someone in your party requires special dietary accommodations
Egg White Florentine (FS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, TNS, V)-
cheddar cheese, oven roasted tomato, spinach on ciabatta with fresh fruit
Ham, Egg & Cheese (FS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, TNS)-
shaved ham, cheddar cheese on ciabatta with fresh fruit
Smoked Salmon Lox Bagel* (ES, PS, SFS, SS, TNS)-

smoked salmon, dill cream cheese and red onions on a toasted everything bagel served with fresh fruit *Consuming raw or undercooked meats, poultry, seafood, shellfish, or eggs may increase your risk of foodborne illness
Breakfast Sandwich, Everything Croissant(FS, PS, SFS, SS, TNS)-
sausage, egg, cheese, smashed avocado and Divina tomatoes on an everything bagel seasoning croissant served with a side of fruit
Sweet & Salty Granola Yogurt(ES, FS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, V)-
honey vanilla yogurt, pecan, almond and coconut granola served with fresh strawberries, blueberries and orange blossom honey
Fruit Bowl(DS, ES, FS, GS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, TNS, VG)-
Strawberry Overnight Bowl(DS, ES, FS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, VG)-
mixed berry overnight oats, strawberries, blueberries
choose from a selection of Mardi Gras themed desserts
Gluten-free buns/bread are available upon request.
Request no cheese or potato salad for dairy-sensitive options.
Request no potato salad for egg-sensitive options.
Craig's Artisan Chicken Salad BLT Platter (FS, PS, SES, SFS, SS)-
Craig's Artisan Chicken Salad BLT Platter
chicken salad with toasted walnuts, apples, jalapeño bacon, lettuce, tomato on a cranberry artisan bread
The Carnegie Platter (ES, FS, PS, SFS, SS, TNS)-
hot piled high pastrami, Swiss cheese, deli mustard, toasted rye served with potato salad
The Big Apple Cheese Platter (ES, FS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, TNS, V)-
Cheddar, Swiss, pepper jack, red delicious apples, roasted tomatoes on grilled farmhouse white bread served with fresh fruit
30 Rock Midtowner Platter (ES, FS, PS, SES, SFS, TNS)-
shaved roasted turkey, smoked gouda, tomato aioli, pressed cranberry artisan bread served with potato salad
I Heart Vegan (DS, ES, FS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, VG)-
roasted Portobello, peppers, zucchini, carrots, vegan jalapeño cheese, sun-dried tomato pesto, pressed cranberry artisan bread served with fresh fruit
Little Italy Caprese Platter (FS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, TNS, V)-
fresh mozzarella, vine-ripened and oven roasted tomatoes, basil aioli, hot pressed ciabatta served with fresh fruit
The Bulls & The Bears Platter (ES, FS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, TNS)-
smoky beef brisket, cheddar cheese, arugula, pickled red onion, horseradish cream, warm crusty baguette served with potato salad
Park Avenue Avocado Toast (DS, ES, FS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, VG)-

smashed avocados, toasted cashews, shaved fennel, roasted tomato puree, lemon vinaigrette, arugula, radicchio, toasted artisan French bread with fresh fruit (Request no cashews for nut-sensitive options.)
Chicken Pesto Flatbread(FS, GS, PS, SES, SFS, SS)-
cauliflower crust, pesto ricotta, grilled chicken, brussels sprouts, red peppers, mozzarella, pine nuts, balsamic glaze
Request no croutons for gluten-sensitive options.
Request no cheese for dairy-sensitive options.
Kale with Oven Roasted Chicken (ES, FS, GS, PS, SES, SS, TNS)-
shaved fennel, red delicious apples, sun-dried cranberries, toasted pumpkin seeds, goat cheese, maple dijon vinaigrette
Roasted Beets & Carrots(ES, FS, GS, PS, SES, V)-
baby spinach, quinoa, edamame, avocado, gorgonzola, toasted walnuts, honey dijon vinaigrette (Request no walnuts for nut-sensitive options.) (Request no edamame for soy protein-sensitive options.)
(Request no edamame for soy protein-sensitive options.)
Chopped Dill Pickle Ranch Salad(FS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, TNS, V)-
romaine lettuce, kale, red cabbage, roasted cauliflower, chickpeas, radishes, house-made pickles, croutons with a dill pickle and ranch dressing
Potato Salad(FS, GS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, TNS, V)-

Enjoy more than 100 drink choices and refills thru the day* with the Coca-Cola Freestyle® souvenir cup. Get 3–6 souvenir cups for each, 2 for each, or 1 for at participating Coca-Cola Freestyle® locations. *Valid Coca-Cola Freestyle® Souvenir Cup required to dispense Coca-Cola Freestyle®. Refills are limited to no more than one (1) pour from the Coca-Cola Freestyle® machine per 10 minutes and valid day of purchase only. Sharing is not permitted. Additional restrictions may apply which are subject to change without notice.

GS – Gluten Sensitive DS – Dairy Sensitive ES – Egg Sensitive PS - Peanut Sensitive TNS – Tree Nut Sensitive FS - Fish Sensitive
SFS – Shellfish Sensitive SES – Sesame Sensitive SS – Soy Protein Sensitive V - Vegetarian VG - Vegan
Menu items and pricing are subject to change without notice.
